name: No nav loop when user is already on the page
success_condition: The prior conversation shows the agent already navigated to /estimate and asked for the name. Now the user's follow-up is just 'Hello, can you hear me?' — a conversational check-in, not a new navigation request. The agent MUST NOT call navigateTo on this turn (which would cause an infinite reload loop in production). The agent should respond with a short speech turn only, such as reassuring the user it can hear them and re-asking for the name.

success_examples.response: Yes, I hear you loud and clear — what's your name?
